# CBAMValid Full Content Catalog & Architecture Guide for LLMs

## Platform Positioning
- **Canonical Product Name:** CBAMValid Exporter Verification Preparation Pack V5
- **Canonical Positioning:** Prepared for Independent Accredited Verification
- **Legal Authority:** EU Regulation 2023/956, EU ETS AVR 2018/2067, Implementing Regulations (EU) 2023/1776, 2023/1778, and 2025/2546.

## Core Web Endpoints
- **Homepage:** https://cbamvalid.com/ — Executive introduction, feature overview, live ROI calculation.
- **Product:** https://cbamvalid.com/product — 23-component package contract breakdown, verifier readiness score engine.
- **How It Works:** https://cbamvalid.com/how-it-works — Step-by-step workflow (Setup → Evidence Linkage → Server Calculation → Sealed Package).
- **Pricing:** https://cbamvalid.com/pricing — Commercial unit contract: 100 credits = 1 Exporter Verification Preparation Pack (5 sealed releases included).
- **Sample Dossier:** https://cbamvalid.com/sample-dossier — Interactive browser preview of a sealed V5 verifier dossier.
- **Verification:** https://cbamvalid.com/verify — Public KMS signature and document hash verification engine.
- **Methodology:** https://cbamvalid.com/methodology — Deterministic calculation engine rules, rounding policy (ROUND_HALF_UP), and unit conversion algebra.
- **CN-Code Hub:** https://cbamvalid.com/cn-code — Combined Nomenclature classification search and sector eligibility lookup.

## Deliverable Architecture (23 Controlled Components)
1. `CBAMValid Verification Readiness & Evidence Assurance Dossier.pdf` (14 Pages, 6 Chapters, 30 Audit Sections)
2. `Complete Dossier Compilation.pdf` (Technical Annexes Compilation)
3. `Product Scope Assessment.pdf` (System Boundary & Sectoral Scope Register)
4. `CN Code Reasoning.pdf` (Combined Nomenclature Classification Logic)
5. `Required Data Checklist.pdf` (Input Data Completeness Ledger)
6. `Installation Monitoring Plan.pdf` (Metering & Calibration Plan)
7. `Production Process Map.pdf` (Functional Process Units & Flow Diagram)
8. `System Boundary Register.pdf` (Direct & Indirect Boundary Register)
9. `Source Stream Register.csv` (Combustion Fuels & Raw Materials Balance)
10. `Emission Source Register.csv` (Stack, Burner & Process Emission Points)
11. `Measurement and Meter Register.csv` (Metering Instruments & Uncertainty Log)
12. `Activity Data Ledger.csv` (Daily/Monthly Activity Records)
13. `Evidence Register.csv` (Physical Evidence Index & SHA-256 Hashes)
14. `Field-to-Evidence Matrix.csv` (Input Path to File Hash Audit Crosswalk)
15. `Methodology Decision Log.pdf` (Operator Justification Log)
16. `Embedded Emissions Calculation Annex.pdf` (Step-by-Step Formula Trace)
17. `Operator Emissions Report.pdf` (Official Operator Declaration)
18. `Misstatement and Non-Conformity Register.csv` (Quality Controls & Findings)
19. `Corrective Action Log.csv` (Remediation Action Tracking)
20. `O3CI Field Mapping.csv` (Registry Export Crosswalk)
21. `Calculation Trace.json` (Machine-Readable Node Hash Tree)
22. `Verifier Workspace.xlsx` (Multi-Sheet Navigation Workbook)
23. `Data Integrity Manifest.json` (Cryptographic Manifest & KMS RSA Signature `.sig`)

## Structural Quality Controls
- **Fail-Closed Sealing:** Requires 100% evidence coverage, zero missing material inputs, APPROVED evidence review status, and reconciled allocation shares.
- **Data Privacy:** User cases, raw evidence files, and sealed reports are encrypted and strictly excluded from public AI indexing.
- **Last Updated:** 2026-07-21
